meaning: n.发起人,主办者,保证人,主办人vt.发起,主办v.赞助
examples: Please could you sponsor me for my school's campaign for Help the Aged?
The company plans to sponsor television programmes as part of its marketing strategy.
Adidas is an official sponsor of the World Cup, so its logo appears on the field.
Spanish bank Santander will sponsor Ferrari next year, although they will still retain a smaller presence with McLaren.
Big Ten rules allow for a conference championship when six schools sponsor a sport.
